message:
🐛 Fix shift+click and cmd+click multi-select for failover groups (#92)

Replace unreliable InkWell onDoubleTap with Listener+onPointerDown
to capture shift/cmd modifier state from raw pointer events.
Shift+click or Cmd+click now reliably enters multi-select mode.
Also adds EPG loading indicator and _lastClickShift state.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
